---
title: "NodeLayer.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\NodeLayer.tsx"
loc: 97
complexity: 7
logic_score: 7.50
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 2.78
---

## Intent
The `NodeLayer.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on tempObject, tempColor, NodeTier, meshRef, useNodeEffects, currentMesh, calculateEffect, NodeLayer, NodeLayer, useNodeEffects, nodesByDetail, tiers, calculateEffect, tierIdx. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via tempObject, tempColor, NodeTier, meshRef, useNodeEffects, currentMesh, calculateEffect, NodeLayer, NodeLayer, useNodeEffects, nodesByDetail, tiers, calculateEffect, tierIdx. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)
- [useNodeEffects](file://../logic/useNodeEffects.ts)

### Exports
- `tempObject`
- `tempColor`
- `NodeTier`
- `meshRef`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `currentMesh`
- `calculateEffect`
- `NodeLayer`
- `NodeLayer`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `nodesByDetail`
- `tiers`
- `calculateEffect`
- `tierIdx`
